There's data in the main repo. Since this worktree was created from main and `data/` was gitignored, it won't have those files. The `.gitignore` change is the scope of this ticket — once merged, the data files can be committed separately from the main working copy.

Done. Removed `data/` from `.gitignore` so ticket and project data will be tracked by git.

**Note:** After merging, you'll want to `git add data/` from the main working copy to actually commit the existing projects and tickets data that was previously ignored.
